# Gen AI Studio — knowledge

## fact
- [Gen AI Studio's MCP Gateway integration — 3 planned phases](/features/gen-ai-studio/knowledge/fact-gen-ai-studio-mcp-integration-roadmap.md) — How Gen AI Studio moves off hand-authored ConfigMaps to registry-discovered, gateway-mediated MCP tool access — discovery, then gateway auth/aggregation, then AI Assets convergence.
- [Gen AI Studio — what it is and how it's built](/features/gen-ai-studio/knowledge/fact-gen-ai-studio-overview.md) — Prompt engineering, model interaction, and AI asset management surface in RHOAI — Tech Preview in 3.5 EA, GA target 3.6; a federated module riding on OGX (Llama Stack).

## person
- [Yingzhao Zhou (Ying)](/features/gen-ai-studio/knowledge/person-yingzhao-zhou.md) — UX Research — conducted the RHOAI 3.4 GA end-to-end usability study (deployment through Gen AI Playground).

## question
- [Does ExternalModel CR support make Gen AI Studio's custom-endpoints feature redundant?](/features/gen-ai-studio/knowledge/question-gen-ai-studio-externalmodel-vs-custom-endpoints.md) — If the ExternalModel CR satisfies the same use case as Playground's existing custom-endpoints feature, should custom endpoints be deprecated in its favor?
- [How does MCP Gateway OAuth token exchange flow through Playground user identity?](/features/gen-ai-studio/knowledge/question-gen-ai-studio-mcp-gateway-authn.md) — When Gen AI Studio's Playground calls MCP servers behind the MCP Gateway, how does the end user's identity flow through for per-tool authorization — requires BFF/OGX/Gateway coordination not yet designed.
- [Does Gen AI Studio need a pluggable runtime layer abstracting OGX and AI Gateway?](/features/gen-ai-studio/knowledge/question-gen-ai-studio-ogx-vs-ai-gateway-runtime.md) — Long-term, will Gen AI Studio need a pluggable layer abstracting OGX (Llama Stack) and AI Gateway, or will they coexist indefinitely as alternative backends?
